name: fangma-survey-deployment
description: 放马产品市场调研问卷部署工具

scripts.feishu:test: node -e "const {FeishuAPI} = require('./feishu-server'); console.log('飞书API模块加载成功')"
scripts.feishu:config: cp feishu-config.template.json feishu-config.json && echo '配置文件已创建，请编辑feishu-config.json填写你的飞书配置'
scripts.test: echo "需要在浏览器中手动测试问卷功能" && exit 0

author: 放马项目团队
